prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a woman wearing glasses who is holding up her cell phone to take a picture or view something on it. She appears focused on capturing the moment or checking an important piece of information. There are several other people present in the background, but they do not seem to be interacting with the woman taking the photo.

In addition to the cell phone held by the woman, there are two more cell phones visible in the scene – one located near the top right corner and another towards the bottom left side. These devices might belong to some of the individuals in the background.
